caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black sweatshirt with gold text that reads "BOSS TALK" is seated at a desk in a studio setting. He is positioned in profile, looking toward the left of the frame. In front of him is a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. To his right sits a black mug featuring a red logo. Behind him, a white banner displays the word "HUSTLE" repeated vertically alongside blue and yellow stars. On the wall above, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A small circular logo in the bottom left corner contains the text "BOSS TALK". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a static position, slightly shifting his expression and gaze as he speaks, while the overall environment and equipment remain unchanged.
